problem_text_cn: 3-31 将劲度系数为$k$、自由长度为$L$、质量为$m$的均匀柱形弹性体竖直朝下，上端固定，下端自由。开始时弹性体处处无形变，而后在重力作用下各部位发生运动和形变，因为空气阻力等作用，最后弹性体处于静止状态，试求弹性体的弹性势能和重力势能的各自增量。
problem_text_en: 3-31 A uniform cylindrical elastic body with spring constant $k$, free length $L$, and mass $m$ is hung vertically with its upper end fixed and lower end free. Initially, the body is undeformed everywhere. Then, under gravity, each part moves and deforms; due to air resistance etc., the body finally comes to rest. Find the increments of elastic potential energy and gravitational potential energy of the body.
problem_solution_cn:
解 将弹性势能增加量记为$ \Delta E_{px} $，重力势能增加量记为$ \Delta E_{mg} $。$ \Delta E_{mg} $的计算如下：

弹性体处于原长时，将悬挂点记为$x=0$，弹性体沿长度方向各部位均可用坐标量$ x(0\leqslant x\leqslant L) $标记。取$x$到$x+dx$段，劲度系数为

$$ k_{dx}=\frac{L}{dx}k. $$

放手后处于平衡态，该小段两端受拉力为

上端：$ \dfrac{m}{L}[L-(x+dx)]g $，下端：$ \dfrac{m}{L}(L-x)g $，

两者差无穷小量，可处理为两端各有$ \dfrac{m}{L}(L-x)g $拉力。该小段伸长量为

$$ dl=\frac{m(L-x)g}{Lk_{dx}}=\frac{mg}{kL^{2}}(L-x)dx, $$

弹性体伸长量便是

$$ \Delta L=\int_{0}^{L} dl=\frac{mg}{2k}. $$

$x$到$x+dx$段内弹性力处处相同，内含弹性势能

$$ dE_{px}=\frac{1}{2}k_{dx}(dl)^{2}=\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{2kL^{3}}(L-x)^{2}dx, $$

弹性体内含的弹性势能，即$ \Delta E_{px} $为

$$ \Delta E_{px}=\int_{0}^{L} dE_{px}=\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{6k}. $$

$\Delta E_{mg}$（重力势能减少量）的计算：

弹性体从$x=0$到原$x$点之间的一段，质量为

$$ m_{x}=\frac{x}{L}m, $$

伸长量则是

$$ \Delta L_{x}=\int_{0}^{x} dl=\frac{mg}{2kL^{2}}(2L-x)x. $$

原$x$到$x+dx$小段重力势能减少量为

$$ -dE_{mg}=\left(\frac{dx}{L}m\right) g\left(\Delta L_{x}\right)=\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{2L^{3}k}(2L-x)x dx, $$

积分得

$$ -\Delta E_{mg}=\int_{0}^{L}(-dE_{mg})=\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{3k}, $$

即有

$$ \Delta E_{mg}=-\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{3k}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution Denote the increment of elastic potential energy as $ \Delta E_{px} $ and the increment of gravitational potential energy as $ \Delta E_{mg} $. The calculation of $ \Delta E_{mg} $ is as follows:

When the body is at its natural length, set the hanging point as $x=0$; each part along the length can be labelled by a coordinate $ x(0\leqslant x\leqslant L) $. Take the segment from $x$ to $x+dx$, whose spring constant is

$$ k_{dx}=\frac{L}{dx}k. $$

After release, in equilibrium, the tension at the two ends of this small segment is

upper end: $ \dfrac{m}{L}[L-(x+dx)]g $, lower end: $ \dfrac{m}{L}(L-x)g $.

The difference is an infinitesimal, so we can treat both ends as having a tension $ \dfrac{m}{L}(L-x)g $. The elongation of the segment is

$$ dl=\frac{m(L-x)g}{Lk_{dx}}=\frac{mg}{kL^{2}}(L-x)dx, $$

the total elongation of the body is

$$ \Delta L=\int_{0}^{L} dl=\frac{mg}{2k}. $$

Inside the segment from $x$ to $x+dx$, the elastic force is uniform; the elastic potential energy contained in it is

$$ dE_{px}=\frac{1}{2}k_{dx}(dl)^{2}=\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{2kL^{3}}(L-x)^{2}dx, $$

hence the elastic potential energy stored in the whole body, i.e. $ \Delta E_{px} $, is

$$ \Delta E_{px}=\int_{0}^{L} dE_{px}=\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{6k}. $$

Calculation of $\Delta E_{mg}$ (decrease of gravitational potential energy):

The mass of the part from $x=0$ to the original point $x$ is

$$ m_{x}=\frac{x}{L}m, $$

and its elongation is

$$ \Delta L_{x}=\int_{0}^{x} dl=\frac{mg}{2kL^{2}}(2L-x)x. $$

The decrease of gravitational potential energy for the small segment from original $x$ to $x+dx$ is

$$ -dE_{mg}=\left(\frac{dx}{L}m\right) g\left(\Delta L_{x}\right)=\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{2L^{3}k}(2L-x)x dx, $$

integrating gives

$$ -\Delta E_{mg}=\int_{0}^{L}(-dE_{mg})=\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{3k}, $$

so

$$ \Delta E_{mg}=-\frac{m^{2}g^{2}}{3k}. $$
img_cn: 该图片是一张物理习题集的页面扫描图，内容是关于机械能定理的一道题目。页面上方是题目“3-31 将劲度系数为k、自由长度为L、质量为m的均匀柱形弹性体竖直朝下，上端固定，下端自由。开始时弹性体处处无形变，而后在重力作用下各部位发生运动和形变，因为空气阻力等作用，最后弹性体处于静止状态，试求弹性体的弹性势能和重力势能的各自增量。”下方是详细的解题过程，包括公式推导和积分计算。页面底部有页码“96”和“力学习题与解答”字样。背景为白色，文字为黑色印刷体，排版清晰，是典型的教科书内页风格。
img_en: The image is a scanned page from a physics exercise book, containing a problem on the theorem of mechanical energy. The top of the page presents the problem: "3-31 A uniform cylindrical elastic body with spring constant k, free length L, and mass m is hung vertically with the upper end fixed and the lower end free. Initially, the body is undeformed. Under gravity, each part moves and deforms; due to air resistance etc., the body finally comes to rest. Find the increments of elastic potential energy and gravitational potential energy of the body." Below is a detailed solution, including formula derivations and integral calculations. The bottom of the page shows the page number "96" and the text "力学习题与解答" (Exercise Answers for Mechanics). The background is white, the text is in black print, and the layout is clear, typical of a textbook page style.
problem_answer: 弹性势能增量 $\Delta E_{px} = \dfrac{m^{2}g^{2}}{6k}$，重力势能增量 $\Delta E_{mg} = -\dfrac{m^{2}g^{2}}{3k}$。
